title: Battle of Falleen (Yuuzhan Vong War)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Falleen}} {{Battle |prev=*[[Battle of Gyndine]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' *[[Battle of Fondor]] *Invasion of the [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] **[[Battle of Nal Hutta]] **[[Battle of Ylesia (26 ABY)|Battle of Ylesia]]''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' *[[Battle of Kalarba]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |conc=*Conquest of the Hutt Space *[[Battle of Druckenwell (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Druckenwell]] |next=*[[Battle of Rodia (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Rodia]] *[[Evacuation of Kubindi]] *[[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Duro]] |image=[[File:RodiaYVW-TEA.jpg]] |name=Battle of Falleen |conflict=[[Yuuzhan Vong War]] |date=[[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] (c. 61:3)''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the start of [[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point|''Balance Point'']] ten months after the [[Destruction of Sernpidal]], which occurs in 60.5 per ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''. |place=[[Falleen (planet)/Legends|Falleen]] |result=[[Yuuzhan Vong]] victory |side1=[[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] |side2=Yuuzhan Vong |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1= |forces2=[[Yuuzhan Vong fleet]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1= |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian=The population of Falleen was [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] }} {{Quote|I guess Druckenwell's gone, too?''"
"''And Falleen. They've reached Rodia. It's the heavy end of the hammer, pounding and pounding.|[[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]]|}} During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Falleen (planet)/Legends|Falleen]] was '''attacked''' by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. During their campaign to cut off the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]], Falleen was among those worlds conquered with others being [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]], [[Druckenwell/Legends|Druckenwell]] and [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]]. Since the [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] had not joined the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the vast majority of the species lived on the planet and they could expect no New Republic reinforcements. Following the battle, the Yuuzhan Vong sent the population into reeducation camps. ==History== ===Invasion=== {{Quote|Unbelievable.|Jacen Solo wondering if the Falleen had fought or used their infamous pheromones to buy a measure of freedom.|}} [[File:RodiaSurroundingsAtCorellianRun.jpg|left|thumb|250px|The Rimward planets along the Corellian Run came under threat of attack after the fall of Kalarba]] In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] race of invaders, the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], launched a massive [[Yuuzhan Vong War|conquest campaign]] directed against all worlds of the [[Galactic community]].''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' [[26 ABY/Legends|Less than a year later]],{{GamerCite|8|I, Yuuzhan Vong}} in an attempt to cut off the Rimward leg of the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]], a vital [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]], the Yuuzhan Vong initiated a blitz across the [[Doldur sector/Legends|Doldur sector]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' and [[Battle of Kalarba|devastated]] [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]]. The isolated worlds along the Corellian Run toward the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] went on full alert as the Yuuzhan Vong captured them one after another. Confidence in the strength of these worlds had been low, and other star systems not yet touched by the war had expected an influx of [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] and [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]]. The Falleen people had such a strong isolationist spirit that they did not even join the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].{{DB|species|falleen|Falleen}} When the Yuuzhan Vong [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet|invasion fleet]] reached [[Falleen (planet)/Legends|Falleen]], the world surrendered almost immediately. While the planets [[Battle of Druckenwell (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Druckenwell]] and Falleen were captured by the invaders, the planet [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]] was [[Battle of Rodia (Yuuzhan Vong War)|placed]] in a vulnerable position. Afterward, the [[Peace Brigade]], a paramilitary group loyal to the Yuuzhan Vong, captured at least one refugee convoy from Falleen and enslaved its passengers.''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]'' ===Aftermath=== The worlds and star systems conquered at that time, including Falleen, had been home to some of the most visible and active starfaring species. Whether by design on the part of the invaders or merely by coincidence, this strategy gave further fuel to the arguments of [[Speciesism|non-Human activists]]. The most paranoid believed that the New Republic leadership had somehow orchestrated a conspiracy to do what the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] had failed to do – to kill all non-Humans. Many Falleen had hoped that their famous [[Pheromone/Legends|pheromone]]-based powers of persuasion might make other [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] friendly toward them, perhaps saving their world. However, the Yuuzhan Vong moved the Falleen into isolation within reeducation camps. Falleen was not liberated before the end of the war, when the [[Sekot accords|surrender]] of the invaders was signed.''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' Following the Yuuzhan Vong invasion, the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|new galactic government]] had even less contact with Falleen and its inhabitants than it had before.''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'' ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' {{C|[[:File:NJOmaps_ELI.png|Galaxy map]] only}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' {{C|[[:File:NJOmaps_ELI.png|Galaxy map]] only}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Traitor]]'' {{C|[[:File:NJOmaps_ELI.png|Galaxy map]] only}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' *{{FactFile|81|FAL 1-2|Falleen}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{YuuzhanVongWarNav}} {{Interlang |es=Batalla de Falleen (Guerra Yuuzhan Vong) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Falleen (Yuuzhan Vong War), battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Falleen]] [[Category:Battles of the Yuuzhan Vong War]]
